2606.29667.title: Unlocking the Visual Record of Materials Science: A Large-Scale Multimodal Dataset from Scientific Literature
2606.29667.paper_summary: The materials science literature encodes decades of experimental knowledge in figures, yet this visual record remains locked away and inaccessible to AI at scale. The core difficulty is structural: most scientific figures are compound, with a single caption describing multiple sub-panels simultaneously, making direct image-text pairing unreliable. We present MatMMExtract, an end-to-end open-source pipeline that resolves this by decomposing compound figures into individual sub-panels and generating structured, grounded annotations using a large language model guided by a curated materials science taxonomy. Applied to 14,810 open-access articles, MatMMExtract produces MatSciFig; 391,606 panel-level image-text pairs from 180,571 figures, each annotated with a sub-caption, a two-level visualisation category spanning 19 classes and over 100 subtypes, and a scientific summary. To enable accurate panel localisation, we introduce MaterialScope, a domain-specific detection dataset of 2,811 manually annotated materials science figures, on which a fine-tuned YOLO12-m detector achieves mAP_50 of 0.9227. Among six benchmarked language models, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite delivers the best cost-quality trade-off for annotation generation, with 82% of outputs rated good and a hallucination rate of 4.8%. A dual-encoder retrieval baseline on MatSciFig achieves a 4.4 times improvement in R@1 over zero-shot CLIP, demonstrating the dataset's immediate utility for vision-language learning. All resources are released openly to the community.
2606.29667.paper_summary_zh: 材料科學文獻將數十年的實驗知識編碼在圖形中，然而這一視覺記錄仍然被鎖定，無法大規模地被AI訪問。核心困難在於結構：大多數科學圖形是複合的，單一標題同時描述多個子面板，使得直接的圖像-文本配對不可靠。我們提出了MatMMExtract，一個端到端的開源管道，通過將複合圖形分解為單獨的子面板，並使用由策劃的材料科學分類法指導的大型語言模型生成結構化的、基於實證的註釋，來解決這一問題。應用於14,810篇開放獲取的文章，MatMMExtract產生了MatSciFig；391,606個面板級圖像-文本對，來自180,571個圖形，每個都附有子標題、一個涵蓋19個類別和超過100個子類型的兩級可視化類別，以及一個科學摘要。為了實現準確的面板定位，我們引入了MaterialScope，一個特定於領域的檢測數據集，包含2,811個手動註釋的材料科學圖形，在此基礎上，經過微調的YOLO12-m檢測器達到了0.9227的mAP_50。在六個基準語言模型中，Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite在註釋生成方面提供了最佳的成本-質量權衡，82%的輸出被評為良好，幻覺率為4.8%。在MatSciFig上的雙編碼檢索基線在R@1上實現了比零-shot CLIP高出4.4倍的改進，顯示了該數據集在視覺-語言學習中的即時實用性。所有資源均向社區公開釋放。
2606.29667.author: Subham Ghosh et.al.
2606.29667.authors: Subham Ghosh, Shubham Tiwari, Mohammad Ibrahim, Abhishek Tewari
